name: kwilt
description: Connect Codex to Kwilt context and control-plane workflows through MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Use Kwilt context and to-dos from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to Kwilt through MCP so the agent can inspect the authenticated account, read Arcs, Goals, recent Activities, Chapter context, and show-up status, then capture durable Goals and To-dos when you ask Codex to build, plan, or preserve follow-up work.
defaultPrompt: What Kwilt account are you connected to?
What does my recent Kwilt activity suggest?
Use Kwilt to keep track of the durable to-dos for this build.
